case_id: Patient PID 14 (Coreen Treutel) - randomized per task run

verifier.py line 88: 'if diff <= 300: # 5 minutes' - tolerance is hardcoded to 300 seconds (5 minutes), not 15 minutes. This value is never read from metadata and the metadata value is never used in the verification logic.

privileged_info_summary: The NOSH ChartingSystem task uses a real open-source EHR system (shihjay2/nosh2) running in Docker with synthetic patient data. Admin credentials are admin / Admin1234!. The provider Dr. James Carter (id=2) is configured in the database. Office Visit is the available appointment type. Patient data comes from Synthea synthetic patient generator (Massachusetts cohort), with 20 pre-loaded patients (PIDs 1-20). The schedule_appointment task targets a random active patient. Critically: the metadata claims tolerance_minutes=15, but the verifier code hardcodes a 5-minute tolerance (300 seconds at line 88 of verifier.py). This is a direct contradiction.
